name: Dragon Ball
description: The Dragon Balls are mystical orbs scattered throughout the world, imbued with immense power and capable of summoning a wish-granting dragon when all seven are gathered. Their origins are often tied to powerful deities or ancient dragons, who either created them or imbued them with their essence. The power of the dragon, usually Shenron, is limited only by the creator's own power, and the wishes granted can range from immortality to resurrecting the dead. However, there are usually limitations and consequences to using the Dragon Balls, such as a cooldown period before they can be used again, or negative energy accumulation if wishes are selfishly made. The Dragon Balls represent hope, ambition, and the pursuit of dreams, but also serve as a cautionary tale about the potential dangers of unchecked power. Their significance lies in their ability to alter fate itself, making them highly sought after by heroes and villains alike. The journey to collect them often involves overcoming great challenges and forming strong bonds, highlighting the importance of courage, friendship, and selflessness. The legends surrounding the Dragon Balls have become deeply ingrained in popular culture, inspiring countless stories and adaptations.
subtitle: Mystical orbs that grant wishes.
origin: Created by powerful dragons or deities.

keyMyths.title: The Summoning of Shenron
keyMyths.description: When all seven Dragon Balls are gathered and a specific incantation is spoken, the Eternal Dragon Shenron emerges from the Dragon Balls. He will grant a single wish to the summoner before dispersing back into the balls, which then scatter across the world.

keyMyths.title: The Scattering of the Dragon Balls
keyMyths.description: After Shenron grants a wish, the Dragon Balls turn to stone and scatter across the globe. They remain dormant for a year before they can be used again, adding a strategic element to their collection and use.

sources.author: Akira Toriyama
sources.description: The original manga and anime series that popularized the Dragon Balls.
sources.text: The original manga and anime series that popularized the Dragon Balls.

sources.author: Numerous
sources.description: Various anime, manga, and video game adaptations building upon the original lore.
